tool_args.label: First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS Corridor same_as First Avenue/Second Avenue Corridor

payload.description: Both records represent the same First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS/BRT corridor from South Ferry to 125th Street in Manhattan. corridor_first-second-ave-sbs derives from the 2010-03-10 CB3 presentation; corridor_first-second-avenues-brt aggregates across the broader 2009–2010 BRT outreach series for the same project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS corridor in Manhattan, showing the route from South Ferry to 125th Street.
8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street
